syntax_4417.creator: Skylyxx
syntax_4417.title: SkDynmap - Style of area
syntax_4417.description:
This expression returns the style of an area or an area builder.
You can use this expression to define the style of an area or an area builder.

en:
This expression returns the style of an area or an area builder.
You can use this expression to define the style of an area or an area builder.

You can use this expression to define the description of an area or an area builder.

en:
This expression returns the description of an area or an area builder.
You can use this expression to define the description of an area or an area builder.

syntax_4476.creator: Skylyxx

syntax_4472.creator: Skylyxx

syntax_4475.creator: Skylyxx
syntax_4475.title: Area builder
syntax_4475.description: The constructor for a future area
syntax_4475.syntax_pattern:
new [dynmap] area named %string% at %locations%
new [dynmap] area named %string% at %locations% with [style] %areastyle%
new [dynmap] area named %string% with description %string% at %locations%
new [dynmap] area named %string% with description %string% at %locations% with [style] %areastyle%
new [dynmap] area with id %string% named %string% at %locations%
new [dynmap] area with id %string% named %string% at %locations% with [style] %areastyle%
new [dynmap] area with id %string% named %string% with description %string% at %locations%
new [dynmap] area with id %string% named %string% with description %string% at %locations% with [style] %areastyle%

en: The constructor for a future area
